name: Professional Services Accelerator
manualSteps: Set up automations: when Deliverables 'Due Date' is 3 days away and Status is not 'Submitted to Client' -> notify Owner
Set up automations: when Time & Resource Tracking 'Status' changes to 'Approved' -> calculate Billable Amount (Hours x Rate)
Set up automations: when Client Projects 'Budget Remaining' drops below 10% of Contract Value -> change Risk Level to 'High'
Set up automations: when Deliverables 'Client Approved' changes to 'Approved' -> update Deliverables Status to 'Approved'
Set up automations: weekly summary email to Project Lead with hours logged, deliverables due, budget status
Configure status labels: Project Status (Onboarding, Active, On Hold, Closing Out, Completed)
Configure status labels: Project Priority (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
Configure status labels: Risk Level (Low, Medium, High, Critical)
Configure status labels: Time Entry Status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Invoiced)
Configure status labels: Deliverable Status (Not Started, In Progress, Internal Review, Submitted, Revision Required, Approved)
Configure status labels: Client Approved (Pending, Approved, Rejected)
Configure status labels: Revision Requested (None, Minor, Major)
Configure dropdown values: Project Type (Strategy, Implementation, Advisory, Audit, Training, Retainer)
Configure dropdown values: Billing Type (Fixed Fee, Time & Materials, Retainer, Milestone-Based, Blended)
Configure dropdown values: Task Category (Strategy, Analysis, Development, Documentation, Meetings, Admin, Travel)
Configure dropdown values: Deliverable Type (Report, Presentation, Workshop, Assessment, Roadmap, Implementation Plan, Training Materials, Audit Report)
Set up views: Client Projects Timeline (Gantt by Start Date to Target Completion)
Set up views: Deliverables Kanban (by Status)
Set up views: Time Tracking Calendar (by Date, filtered by team member)
Set up AI Blocks: auto-calculate utilization rate (Billable Hours / Total Hours)
Set up AI Blocks: auto-flag projects approaching budget ceiling
Set up integrations: Google Calendar (sync meetings as non-billable time entries)
Set up integrations: Google Drive (deliverable document storage and versioning)
